name: wholeTowerBreathing
description: Symmetric triangle breathe across all 24 LEDs in lockstep. Period 256 ticks, peak ~42/255 (PWM 255 / divisor 6 / 255). Mirrors firmware Sequence_WholeTowerBreathing (case 0x14).

tracks._comment: One breathe call per outer loop iteration. Closure-captured elapsed counter survives loop iterations.
